eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: North Carolina; at 3:52 AM on JUN 9, 2026 Effective until 4:52 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is an AMBER Alert for a Child abduction Emergency. Kamora Thomas is an 11-year-old female, described as 5 1 , 150 pounds with black hair and brown eyes. The child was last seen June 8th,2026 at 4:43 PM near 3622 Belmont Street in Greensboro, wearing a white graphic shirt, pink pajama pants, black slippers with jewels. The suspect vehicle is an Orange in color 2023 Jeep Wrangler, with Georgia license plate ETL069. The vehicle was last seen in Georgia. Contact Greensboro Police Department at (336) 574-3573 with any information.
